response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong technical leadership experience in software development, open-source contributions, and team mentorship, aligning well with leadership requirements. However, his limited German proficiency (basic) and lack of explicit UML/professional IT architecture experience in leadership roles are concerns. His diverse tech stack and problem-solving skills are assets, but his remote focus in Kenya and limited exposure to German IT consulting contexts may reduce immediate fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks (Node.js, TypeScript, D, Java, Python)
Proven leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and team mentorship (Altom Consulting, RIDE Capital)
Strong technical depth in architecture, testing (TDD), and DevOps (CI/CD, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Limited German proficiency (basic) and no clear evidence of C1-level German, a key requirement for client-facing roles
Inconsistent evidence of high-level IT architecture and UML design in leadership contexts; focus has been more on development and project execution
Remote work experience in Kenya may not align with the company's potential domestic travel requirements or cultural expectations
